creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 146624
Fixed ipopt shar file

Sorry for the delay ...

I noticed a silly bug: I had inverted the configure env with args. After fixing this the resulting *.pc files look much better.

If there are still problems there is a plan (b):
I found that there is a --without-pkg-config argument for configure.
We can just uncomment the extra configure arg and drop pkgconfig from the USES line.
